cards.title: Nitro Drive Enhanced enters Early Access!
cards.subtitle: Welcome!
cards.body: Thanks for playing the first public version of Nitro Drive Enhanced. More content is coming soon.

cards.title: 🚓 Police Weekend

cards.body: Earn double cash from all police pursuits this weekend.

cards.title: ⚠ Server Maintenance
